title: CTF Writeups
summary: A growing collection of reverse engineering and binary exploitation writeups across ImaginaryCTF, Midnight Flag, K17, BITS, Osu, tkb and others.

title: Hawker Opportunity Score Platform
summary: Full-stack geospatial platform scoring business opportunity for Singapore's hawker centres. Built for SC2006 with Vite/React, FastAPI, PostGIS-style data and an AI assistant layer.

title: AgenticNetSec
summary: Network forensic analysis platform that turns large PCAP batches into deterministic evidence, per-file reports, enrichment results, and campaign-level ransomware investigation summaries.

title: .text Checksum for Android NDK
summary: Native Android NDK tamper / hook detection sample. Computes a checksum of the loaded ELF .text segment and verifies integrity at runtime.

title: Home Net Drift Monitor
summary: A small home-network scanner that fingerprints devices, diffs against a baseline, scores risk, and can emit a PDF report of changes over time.

title: SC2002 BTO Management System
summary: NTU SC2002 group project: a Java CLI system managing BTO applications with reports, role-based flows, data persistence and Javadocs.

title: Personal Blog (MDX)
summary: A minimal MDX blog playground — used as a scratchpad for longer-form writing, separate from the CTF writeups.
